mapper.insert: INSERT INTO progress_analysis_log (analysis_id, snapshot_id, wbs_task_id, wbs_project_id, before_progress, after_progress, confidence, analysis_notes, rag_evidence) VALUES (#{analysisId}, #{snapshotId}, #{wbsTaskId}, #{wbsProjectId}, #{beforeProgress}, #{afterProgress}, #{confidence}, #{analysisNotes}, #{ragEvidence})
mapper.select: SELECT analysis_id AS "analysisId", snapshot_id AS "snapshotId", wbs_task_id AS "wbsTaskId", wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", before_progress AS "beforeProgress", after_progress AS "afterProgress", confidence, analysis_notes AS "analysisNotes", rag_evidence AS "ragEvidence", analyzed_at AS "analyzedAt" FROM progress_analysis_log WHERE wbs_project_id = #{wbsProjectId} ORDER BY analyzed_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT analysis_id AS "analysisId", snapshot_id AS "snapshotId", wbs_task_id AS "wbsTaskId", before_progress AS "beforeProgress", after_progress AS "afterProgress", confidence, analysis_notes AS "analysisNotes", rag_evidence AS "ragEvidence", analyzed_at AS "analyzedAt" FROM progress_analysis_log WHERE wbs_task_id = #{wbsTaskId} ORDER BY analyzed_at DESC

SELECT analysis_id AS "analysisId", snapshot_id AS "snapshotId", after_progress AS "afterProgress", confidence, analysis_notes AS "analysisNotes", analyzed_at AS "analyzedAt" FROM progress_analysis_log WHERE wbs_task_id = #{wbsTaskId} ORDER BY analyzed_at DESC LIMIT 1
